picks.quote: Habib Nurmagomedov hits hard. Benson's 42. He's been out for a while. I feel like Habib Nurmagomedov probably knocks him out. Yeah, I'm going to go Habib Nurmagomedov KO.
Grant Dawson to fight Musaev. I think Tofiq Musaev's too powerful. With the grappling skills he has? I think he probably stops Grant.

I think Holloway wins, but Max Holloway gets hit a lot, bro. He lands a lot. He gets hit a lot. McGregor hits hard. It's at 170. Holloway's taken some shots over the years. Can you imagine McGregor chins Max Holloway in a shock?
I kind of feel like Bautista's live to steal that decision, man. Something telling me Sandhagen's going to get outworked.
I bet Gaethje's looking real good in his training vids. I bet Gaethje's going to be as good as he's ever been. I'm still picking Topuria
I'm going to say over. I'm going to say over, bro. I'm going to say Verhoeven can survive a little bit... I'm going over 5 and 1/2.
